# reviewqr.site

> Free Google Maps Review QR Code Generator. No signup, no watermarks, no limits.

reviewqr.site is a 100% free tool to create customizable QR codes for Google Maps business reviews. Designed for restaurants, cafés, hotels, salons, clinics, and local businesses.

## Features

- QR codes from Google Maps review links
- 5 premium frame designs with Google logo and 5-star badges
- Logo upload, custom colors, custom text, 5 fonts
- Multi-language: EN, PT, ES, FR, DE (auto-detected)
- High-res PNG download and clipboard copy
- Dark/light mode
- No signup, no watermarks, no limits, no ads, $0

## Links

- [Homepage](https://reviewqr.site)
- [Full documentation](https://reviewqr.site/llms.txt)
